settings.remove_wallet_error: Failed to remove wallet. Please try again.
settings.remove_wallets_error: Failed to remove wallets. Please try again.

wallets.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.
wallets.remove_all_wallets_description: You're about to disconnect all your accounts. Keep in mind that you will need your seed phrases or private keys to connect them again.
wallets.remove_wallet_description: You're about to remove this account. Keep in mind that, to use it again, you will need to use your seed phrase.
wallets.edit_name_disclaimer: Keep in mind that this name works locally for you to easily identify your account. None of this data is reflected on the blockchain.

Looks empty in here.
Add your first contact clicking the button.
addressbook.remove_confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your address book?

account_add.import_seed_description: Import an account using a different seed phrase

amount.invalid: The amount must be greater than 0

send.transaction_bridge_success:
Transaction pending, this could take a few minutes.
Head to your Wallet Overview section to keep track of the status.
send.transaction_fail:
Transaction failed.
Please try again later.
send.empty_account_fee: It is not possible to estimate the fee because the destination account is empty

balance.percentage_info: Variation of your position in the last 24 hours.

lock.title: Enter your password
lock.forgot_content:
Salmon does not store any information of your account. That includes your password. If you forgot it, you will need to disconnect all your accounts. Keep in mind that to re-import them you will need your seedphrase or private key.

Are you sure you want to proceed?
lock.reset_wallet_message:
If you forgot your password, you will need to reset your wallet. This will permanently delete all accounts and data from this device.

You can restore your wallet using your seed phrase after resetting.
lock.confirm_message: This action cannot be undone. All wallet data will be permanently deleted.
lock.unlock_failed: Failed to unlock wallet. Please try again.
lock.reset_failed: Failed to reset wallet. Please try again.

wallet.prices_issue: We are having issues to get prices
wallet.load_error: We are having issues to load data

create.messageBody:
You will need these words to restore your account if your browser's storage is cleared or your device is damaged or lost. 

 Never share your seed phrase (or your private keys) with anyone or enter it into any form, as it provides full control of your account. 

 Salmon Team will never ask for your recovery phrase or private keys.
create.your_seed_phrase_body: Make sure you save the following words in a safe place. Also, keep in mind that the position of each word is important.
create.confirm_seed_phrase_body: Please re-enter the following words of the seed phrase to confirm that you have saved it.
create.wrong_password: Password must be between 8 and 20 characters
create.choose_a_password_body: You will need it to unlock your wallet
create.i_accept_terms_conditions:
By tapping the Create Account button 
I accept the Terms & Conditions
create.no_derivable_accounts: No derivable accounts with balance found
create.derivable_description: Derivables are "sub accounts" that are born from the same seed phrase. Using cryptography, the seed phrase it combined with a derivation path to create these different accounts. It allows the generation of as many accounts as you wish to have under the same seed phrase.

recover.messageBody: Recover your account using your 12/24 words seed phrase.
recover.i_accept_terms_conditions:
By tapping the Recover Account button 
I accept the Terms & Conditions

onboarding.content1:
Your all-in-one & open-source wallet
for the crypto space
onboarding.title2:
Keep the control
of your tokens
onboarding.content2:
All your assets, in your hands.
We don’t have access to them at all.

connection.title: Allow this site to connect?
connection.advice: Only connect with sites you trust.
connection.advice2: Nevertheless, your approval will be requested to complete any transaction.

bridge.own_wallet_alert: Keep in mind that to see the tokens you will receive, you will have to switch from this {{from}} Wallet to the {{to}} one from the menu.
bridge.other_wallet_alert: Keep in mind that the tokens you will receive are being sent to a {{to}} Wallet that it’s not configured in Salmon. You will not see the tokens unless you open that wallet.
